_meta.purpose: Schema context for Qwen Coder 14B — used during intent analysis, column selection, and DAX generation
_meta.reporting_frequency: Monthly — each load is one calendar month
_meta.loan_type_identification: loanappno prefix: LP = Loan Against Property, MLP = Micro Loan Against Property, HL = Home Loan , MHL = Micro Home Loan

fields.description: Loan Application Number — unique identifier per loan account. Primary key of the dataset. Format: LP000000136474 or HL0000000108833.
fields.use_in_dax: Use COUNT(loanappno) for loan-level counts. Use as primary key in relationships.
fields.never_aggregate_as: Do NOT SUM or AVG this field.

fields.description: Days Past Due at customer level (month-end). Worst DPD across all loans for a customer. DPD=0 means no overdue.
fields.use_in_dax: Use for customer-level delinquency analysis. Filter dpd > 0 for delinquent customers.

fields.description: Days Past Due at loan application level. Specific to each loanappno. May differ from dpd if customer has multiple loans.
fields.use_in_dax: Use for loan-level DPD analysis. SUM or AVG as needed for DPD distribution.

fields.description: Asset classification of the loan. Standard Asset = non-delinquent. Any other value = delinquent. Used in bucket logic.
fields.use_in_dax: Use in CALCULATE filters for bucket classification logic. Standard Asset = performing.

fields.description: Total Overdue Amount = Principal Overdue + Interest Overdue + Pre-EMI Overdue. Total unpaid outstanding.
fields.use_in_dax: SUM(TOD) for total overdue. Use with Op bucket filter for segment-level overdue.

fields.description: Balance Principal = Balance Principal Outstanding + Principal Overdue. Total principal remaining on loan.
fields.use_in_dax: SUM(bal_prin) for outstanding principal. Key financial metric for portfolio size.

fields.description: Opening month start date (e.g., 01-02-2026 format DD-MM-YYYY). The first date of the reporting month.
fields.use_in_dax: Use for time-based filtering. Format: DD-MM-YYYY.

fields.description: EMI/NACH payment bounce status. Tech = bounce due to technical issue. Non Tech = intentional bounce by customer. PAID = customer paid via NACH successfully.
fields.use_in_dax: Filter Bounce status IN ('Tech','Non Tech') for bounce count. Bounce status = 'PAID' means successful payment. NEVER count PAID as bounce.

fields.description: Flag: 1 = EMI has increased for this loan. 0 = No EMI change. Used in bucket classification logic.
Customer Identifier (CN prefix). One customer may have multiple loanappno entries. Use for customer-level deduplication.
fields.use_in_dax: DISTINCTCOUNT(Table[Cust ID]) for unique customer counts. Critical: always DISTINCTCOUNT not COUNT for customer metrics.

fields.description: 1 = customer DPD crossed 90 before the due date (high NPA risk). 0 = normal. Used in bucket logic for 60-89 DPD classification.
Opening Bucket — portfolio risk bucket at the START of the month. This is the PRIMARY risk classification field. Use this when user asks about 'how many accounts in X bucket'.
fields.use_in_dax: FILTER by Op bucket for segment analysis. COUNT or DISTINCTCOUNT by Op bucket for distribution.

fields.description: Closing Bucket — portfolio risk bucket at END of month. Shows where account moved to after the month.
fields.use_in_dax: Use with Op bucket for bucket movement analysis. Compare Op bucket vs Closing bucket for flow analysis.

fields.description: Customer movement status based on Opening to Closing bucket transition. PRIMARY metric for collection effectiveness. Norm = resolved/improved. Flow = worsened. Stab = no change. Roll Back = partially improved.
fields.use_in_dax: FILTER Cust wise status = 'Norm' for resolution. COUNT(DISTINCT Cust ID) for customer-level counts.

fields.description: EMI due date for the loan application (e.g., 5th of month for most accounts).
EMI installment number — how many instalments have been scheduled so far.
Service branch name where the loan is managed (e.g., PUNE, JAIPUR, LUCKNOW).
fields.use_in_dax: GROUP BY Branch for branch-level analysis. Filter Branch = 'BRANCH_NAME' for specific branch.

fields.description: Source arrangement of the loan — own company origination or purchased from another company (e.g., State Bank of India - DA01, Tata Capital - DA01, VASTU, Dhansafal).
Loan scheme under which customer was onboarded (e.g., PD ASSESSMENT-FLOATING, BANKING 360-FLOATING, RENTAL INCOME PROGRAM-FLOATING).
Mode of EMI payment. Blank = no payment made in the month.
Bucket based on day of month when payment was made. NA = no payment made.
Digital = any payment mode other than Cash and not blank. Cash = cash payment. Blank payments are excluded from this field.
1 = bounce occurred at loan application level. 0 = no bounce for this specific loanappno.
fields.use_in_dax: SUM for total bounced loans. Use loanappno as granularity.

fields.description: 1 = bounce at customer level. If one loan bounces, ALL loans of the customer are tagged 1. Stricter than loan-level bounce.
fields.use_in_dax: Use DISTINCTCOUNT(Cust ID) WHERE Cust level bounce = 1 for Bounce % calculation.

fields.description: Geographic region where branch belongs (e.g., Pune, Rajasthan, MP, NCR, Karnataka, Telangana).
Month on Book bucket — loan age grouping. Shows how old the loan is.
Overdue bounce charges amount outstanding (not yet collected).
Bounce charges levied in the current reporting month.
Bounce charges actually collected by the collection team in the reporting month.

values: Visit before and after due date
fields.description: Detailed field visit status for the loan account during the month.
Field executive name allocated to this loan for collection. 'NA' (as string, not null) means not allocated.
fields.use_in_dax: Filter Allocation 1 <> 'NA' for allocated accounts.

fields.description: State Head — senior manager in collection hierarchy above Team Leader.
Team Leader — supervises field executives. 'No TL' (as string) means no TL assigned.
fields.use_in_dax: Filter TL <> 'No TL' for accounts with assigned TL.

fields.description: Allocation status: 'Allocated' if Allocation 1 is not NA. 'Non Allocated' if Allocation 1 = NA. Use this for allocation analysis — simpler than checking Allocation 1.
fields.use_in_dax: Filter Allocated or not = 'Allocated' for coverage denominator.

fields.description: Simplified visit flag. Visited = any of the 3 Visited values in Visited field. Not Visited = Not visited.
fields.use_in_dax: Use in Coverage % numerator: FILTER Visit or not = 'Visited' AND Allocated or not = 'Allocated'.

fields.description: Number of field visits to this loanappno in the reporting month.
fields.use_in_dax: SUM(Visit Count) / DISTINCTCOUNT(Cust ID) for Intensity metric.

fields.description: 1 = this customer will become a new NPA in the NEXT month. 0 = not becoming NPA. Forward-looking NPA risk flag.
fields.use_in_dax: FILTER Add NPA = 1 and COUNT loanappno for new NPA additions.

fields.description: Team assignment: Collection = assigned to collection team. Sales = assigned to sales team.
Date when account first entered NPA bucket. NULL = account has never been in NPA.
fields.use_in_dax: NULL means never NPA. Filter NOT NULL for NPA accounts.

fields.description: Number of months this account has been in NPA status. NULL = not in NPA (treat as 0 or exclude).
Grouped portfolio classification — grouped version of Type of Arrangement (e.g., VASTU, State Bank of India DA 1-3, Tata Capital DA01, Other).
fields.use_in_dax: Use Portfolio new for high-level portfolio grouping. More useful than Type of Arrangement for aggregations.

fields.description: Transaction type of the loan (e.g., RESIDENTIAL LAP, COMMERCIAL LAP, BALANCE TRANSFER).
Product category representing the industry segment (e.g., Retail, Micro Housing).
